versions.changelog: Buildings render in true 3D at heights measured from national airborne-LiDAR (ČÚZK) — factories, warehouses, and industrial halls stand at their real height instead of a flat single-storey default — with footprints and workplace placement from the RÚIAN state cadastre. Worker totals and rural coverage come from the CZSO 2021 census employment measure with sub-settlement commute O/D, and a gravity-based correction brings the COVID-inflated 2021 self-commute back to plausible pre-pandemic levels. Special-demand coverage spans hospitals, universities, airports, museums, theatres, libraries, spa/wellness, and sports & convention venues.
Added hospitals, military bases, and library special demand.
Expanded map, fixed resident distribution, overhauled worker seeding / size distribution priors.
Updated resident and worker point seeding, removed self-commute workers.
